uiBuilder.label: Peril-Specific Deductibles
uiBuilder.description: A collapsible card that lists perils, each with an override toggle, a value, and a unit (e.g. % TIV). Composed entirely of standard now-* components.

properties.name: title
properties.label: Title
properties.description: Heading shown in the card header.

properties.name: expanded
properties.label: Expanded
properties.description: When on, the list of perils is shown. The header chevron toggles this at runtime.

properties.name: showOverrideCount
properties.label: Show override count
properties.description: When on, the header shows how many perils currently have their override toggle enabled (e.g. "3 overrides applied").

properties.name: unitOptions
properties.label: Unit options
properties.description: Choices offered by each row's unit dropdown. An object with an `items` array of { id, label }.

properties.name: perils
properties.label: Perils
properties.description: The list of perils. An object with an `items` array; each item: { id, name, required, zone, defaultText, enabled, value, unit }. (Wrapped in an object — a bare top-level array default breaks the production build.)

actions.name: PERIL_DEDUCTIBLE_CHANGED
actions.label: Peril deductible changed
actions.description: Fired when a row's override toggle, value, or unit changes. Payload: { id, name, enabled, value, unit }.

payload.name: id
payload.label: Peril id
payload.description: Identifier of the changed peril row.

payload.name: enabled
payload.label: Override enabled
payload.description: Whether the override toggle is on.
